aboutFixtures.raw: Lucky is a locally owned apparel in Phoenix, AZ. Locally made, Custom orders, Same-day shipping, Wholesale available.
aboutFixtures.expected: Lucky is a locally owned apparel shop in Phoenix, AZ. We offer locally made pieces, custom orders, same-day shipping, and wholesale options.

aboutFixtures.raw: Molcas is a locally owned food in Tucson. Tacos, catering, family owned, open late.
aboutFixtures.expected: Molcas is a locally owned restaurant in Tucson. We serve tacos, offer catering, and keep things welcoming for families and late-night guests.

aboutFixtures.raw: Barrio Builders is a locally owned home_services in Tucson. Remodels, drywall, painting, free estimates.
aboutFixtures.expected: Barrio Builders is a locally owned contractor in Tucson. We handle remodels, drywall, painting, and free estimates with clear communication from start to finish.

aboutFixtures.raw: Sparkle is a locally owned cleaning in Phoenix. Weekly, deep cleans, move outs.
aboutFixtures.expected: Sparkle is a locally owned cleaning business in Phoenix. We offer weekly cleaning, deep cleans, and move-out service for homes that need a reliable reset.

aboutFixtures.expected: Nereida's Salon is a locally owned beauty studio in Tucson. We offer haircuts, color, and lash services in a space built around care and confidence.

aboutFixtures.raw: Desert Spa is a locally owned wellness in Phoenix. Massage, facials, relaxing.
aboutFixtures.expected: Desert Spa is a locally owned wellness studio in Phoenix. We offer massage and facial services designed to help clients slow down and feel restored.

aboutFixtures.raw: Blue Luna Events is a locally owned events in Tucson. Balloons, weddings, birthdays.
aboutFixtures.expected: Blue Luna Events is a locally owned event studio in Tucson. We create balloon installs and event details for weddings, birthdays, and celebrations that need a polished touch.

aboutFixtures.raw: Lens Co is a locally owned photography in Phoenix. Weddings, portraits, events.
aboutFixtures.expected: Lens Co is a locally owned photography business in Phoenix. We photograph weddings, portraits, and events with a calm process and a clean final look.

aboutFixtures.raw: Catalina Homes is a locally owned real_estate in Tucson. Buyers, sellers, listings.
aboutFixtures.expected: Catalina Homes is a real estate business in Tucson helping buyers and sellers move with clarity, local knowledge, and practical guidance.

aboutFixtures.raw: Happy Paws is a locally owned pet_services in Phoenix. Grooming, baths, nails.
aboutFixtures.expected: Happy Paws is a locally owned pet care business in Phoenix. We offer grooming, baths, and nail care for pets who deserve gentle, reliable attention.

aboutFixtures.raw: Lopez Consulting is a locally owned professional_services in Phoenix. Taxes, bookkeeping, payroll.
aboutFixtures.expected: Lopez Consulting is a professional service business in Phoenix. We help with taxes, bookkeeping, and payroll so clients can stay organized and make better decisions.

aboutFixtures.raw: FRCC is a locally owned nonprofit in Tucson. Community, youth, donations.
aboutFixtures.expected: FRCC is a nonprofit organization in Tucson supporting local youth, community programs, and the people who make that work possible.
